query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%telegram%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%message%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%chat%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%log%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%telegram%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%message%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%chat%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%log%';
